summary: Frontend testing of UnitSelect component integration across 5 pages - Verified searchable dropdown component replaces old unit input fields
critical_code_review_comments: UnitSelect component at /app/frontend/src/components/UnitSelect.jsx is well-implemented with search functionality, category grouping, and proper data-testid attributes
All 5 pages correctly import and use UnitSelect component
PlanningBoard.jsx line 801: UnitSelect in material dialog verified working
SiteEngineerProject.jsx lines 430-433: UnitSelect with data-testid='material-unit-select' - code verified
REProjectsPage.jsx lines 583-587: UnitSelect in scope items table - tested and working
PackageManagement.jsx line 416: UnitSelect with dynamic data-testid='scope-unit-{index}' - code verified
MaterialManagement.jsx lines 225-229: UnitSelect with data-testid='material-unit-select' - code verified
test_credentials: Demo login via Demo Access tab: Planning (planning@constructionos.com), Site Engineer (engineer@constructionos.com), Super Admin (admin@constructionos.com)
context_for_next_testing_agent: UnitSelect component has been verified working on PlanningBoard and REProjectsPage via Playwright tests. The component features: (1) Custom searchable dropdown (not Shadcn Select), (2) Search input filters units by label/value/category, (3) Units grouped by category (Count, Weight, Volume, Area, Length, Packaging, Transport, Construction, Work), (4) Checkmark shows selected unit. All pages use UnitSelect with data-testid attributes for testing.

PlanningBoard_Materials_Tab.description: UnitSelect in Add Material dialog - Opened dropdown, verified search input, searched for 'kg', selected 'Kg (Kilogram)'

SiteEngineerProject.description: No projects available for Site Engineer role. Code review confirms UnitSelect at lines 430-433 with data-testid='material-unit-select'

REProjectsPage.description: UnitSelect in Edit RE Project dialog scope items - Clicked Edit, added scope item, opened UnitSelect, searched for 'sqm', selected 'Sqm (Square Meter)'

PackageManagement.description: Code review confirms UnitSelect at line 416 with data-testid='scope-unit-{index}' in scope items tab

MaterialManagement.description: Code review confirms UnitSelect at lines 225-229 with data-testid='material-unit-select' in Add/Edit dialog

unitselect_features_verified: Renders as custom searchable dropdown (not Shadcn Select)
Opens on click with search input focused
Search filters units by label, value, and category
Units are grouped by category headers
Selected unit shows checkmark and displays in button
Proper data-testid attributes for automated testing
